{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.3": 0.3,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The draft contains a Lagrangian derivation, a closed-form claim about k*, and a monotonicity result; logical consistency of the mathematical argument chain is central to any meaningful improvement of a technical draft.",
    "R1.4": "The draft makes three explicit 'first' novelty claims and positions itself against six named prior works; evaluating whether those claims hold is load-bearing for the draft's credibility.",
    "R1.6": "Writing polish is load-bearing for any 'improve this draft' delegation — prose clarity, precision of mathematical notation (e.g. p-bar notation, Lagrangian typography), and paragraph-level flow all require direct attention.",
    "R1.7": "Six citations span 1785–2020 with a mix of conference, journal, and textbook sources; attribution accuracy and whether the coverage adequately situates the contribution are central to draft quality."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should the improvement include verifying the correctness of the mathematical derivations and the 'first in the literature' novelty claims, or is the primary goal prose and expository quality only?"
}

rationale.R1.2: The draft contains a Lagrangian derivation, a closed-form claim about k*, and a monotonicity result; logical consistency of the mathematical argument chain is central to any meaningful improvement of a technical draft.
rationale.R1.4: The draft makes three explicit 'first' novelty claims and positions itself against six named prior works; evaluating whether those claims hold is load-bearing for the draft's credibility.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing for any 'improve this draft' delegation — prose clarity, precision of mathematical notation (e.g. p-bar notation, Lagrangian typography), and paragraph-level flow all require direct attention.
rationale.R1.7: Six citations span 1785–2020 with a mix of conference, journal, and textbook sources; attribution accuracy and whether the coverage adequately situates the contribution are central to draft quality.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the improvement include verifying the correctness of the mathematical derivations and the 'first in the literature' novelty claims, or is the primary goal prose and expository quality only?
